changes: Passage of Arms: The effect is now applied as soon as the action is used.
Salted Earth: The effect is now applied as soon as the action is used.
Enpi: Enhanced Enpi Bonus potency has been increased from 300 to 320.
Gekko: Combo potency has been increased from 420 to 440.
Kasha: Combo potency has been increased from 420 to 440.
Yukikaze: Combo potency has been increased from 360 to 380.
Hissatsu: Yaten: The delay before using your next action has been reduced.
Doton: The effect is now applied as soon as the action is used.
Fire IV: Potency has been increased from 280 to 300.
Radiant Shield: No longer reflects damage to attackers.
Earthen Fury: The effect is now applied as soon as the action is used.
Shadow Flare: The effect is now applied as soon as the action is used.
Verthunder: Potency has been increased from 300 to 310.
Veraero: Potency has been increased from 300 to 310.
Scatter: Chance to be granted Enhanced Scatter has been increased from 25% to 30%.
Enhanced Scatter Bonus has been increased from 8 to 10 Black Mana and White Mana.
Contre Sixte: Potency has been increased from 300 to 350.
Verflare: Potency has been increased from 550 to 600.
Verholy: Potency has been increased from 550 to 600.
Asylum: The effect is now applied as soon as the action is used.
Sacred Soil: The effect is now applied as soon as the action is used.
Shadow Flare: The effect is now applied as soon as the action is used.
Collective Unconscious: The effect is now applied as soon as the action is used.
Minor Arcana: Recast time has been reduced from 5 to 1 second.
Lord of Crowns: Recast time has been reduced from 5 to 1 second.
Lady of Crowns: Recast time has been reduced from 5 to 1 second.

A new PvP action has been added: Tetragrammaton. Restores target's HP (Cure Potency: 3,500). Additional Effect: Reduces Tetragrammaton recast time by a percentage corresponding to the number of healing Lilies stacked at time of action execution (1 Lily: 10%, 2 Lilies: 25%, 3 Lilies: 50%).
Assize: The additional effect 'Deals unaspected damage to all nearby enemies with a potency of 1,000' has been added.
The PvP action Benediction has been removed.
Skewer: Duration of additional effect reducing target's attack potency and healing magic potency by 10% has been increased from 6 to 10 seconds.
Jump: Potency has been increased from 1,000 to 1,250.
Spineshatter Dive: Potency has been increased from 500 to 750.
Blunt Arrow: Recast time increased from 30 to 40 seconds.
Flamethrower: Potency has been increased from 500 to 1,000.
Benefic: Casting Benefic while under the effect of Abridged will cause Abridged to be applied again.

new_content.name: Hells' Kier (Extreme)
new_content.description: New extreme level 70 trial accessible via Raid Finder.

new_content.name: Omega: Alphascape (Savage)
new_content.description: New level 70 savage raid dungeon series.

new_content.name: The Fire-bird Down Below
new_content.description: New Chronicles of a New Era quest (The Four Lords).

new_content.name: In the Beginning, There Was Chaos
new_content.description: New Chronicles of a New Era quest (Interdimensional Rift - Omega).

new_content.name: Lighting the Way
new_content.description: New Doman Enclave side story quest.

new_content.name: The Shifting Altars of Uznair
new_content.description: New treasure hunt instance accessible via gazelleskin treasure maps.

new_content.name: Mannequins
new_content.description: New interior furnishing for estates and apartments to display/sell gear.
new_content.npc_location: Housing merchants in Mist, Lavender Beds, Goblet, Shirogane

new_content.name: Alarm System
new_content.description: New system to set up to ten alarms for game activities.

new_content.name: The Doman Enclave
new_content.description: Exploration zone additions including mounts, aethernet, and mender.

housing.name: Mannequin
housing.description: Mannequins are interior furnishings that you can equip with clothing items. You may select their class or job, as well as gender. Various poses are also available.

housing.name: Unfinished Interior Wall
housing.description: An interior wall of pale unvarnished wood.

housing.name: Carpeting
housing.description: Durable yet fuzzy loop carpet with a checkerboard pattern.

housing.name: Divine Chandelier
housing.description: A contemporary light fixture designed with the Twelve as its primary theme.

housing.name: Birdbath
housing.description: An elegant two-tiered water feature.

housing.name: Garden Gravel
housing.description: Myriad tiny rocks that await your landscaping pleasure.

housing.name: Brick Garden Circle
housing.description: All these squares make a circle.

housing.name: Chocobo Chair
housing.description: A chair for all of (well, one of) the chocobo-lovers out there.

housing.name: Doman Dogwood
housing.description: A sizable potted tree, perpetually in bloom with redolent magenta flowers.

housing.name: Verdant Partition
housing.description: A lush partition covered floor-to-ceiling in ivy and assorted ferns.

housing.name: Mahogany Bunk Bed
housing.description: For weary adults who have spent overmuch on alligator pears and cannot afford to live alone.

housing.name: Bread Rack
housing.description: One could raise an entire army of ducks with this much bread.

housing.name: Chocobo Round Table
housing.description: A round table for all the chocobo- and food-lovers out there.

housing.name: Chocobo Dining Table
housing.description: A large dining table for all the chocobo-, food-, and chocobo-as-food-lovers out there.

housing.name: Season Nine Lone Wolf Trophy
housing.description: A trophy awarded to those who "left their mark" in Season Nine of the Feast.

housing.name: Pot of Cream Stew
housing.description: A warming dish of familiar vegetables simmered for bells in a rich sauce of thickened milk.

housing.name: Redoubtable Rolanberry Tart
housing.description: A flaky-crusted tart with a slight acidity that complements its pleasant sweetness.

housing.name: Crystal Boule
housing.description: A mounted sample of the luminous euhedral crystals that grow uninhibited on the sea floor.

housing.name: Gridanian Bouquet
housing.description: An elegant bouquet for romantic occasions.

housing.name: Little Chef's Playset
housing.description: This set for aspiring culinary artists includes soft, child-safe replicas of kitchen items.

housing.name: Wooden Showcase
housing.description: A simple and elegant showcase for displaying items.

housing.name: Unfinished Shawl
housing.description: A knitter's work is never done.

housing.name: Hand Basket
housing.description: A large and lovely woven vessel.

housing.name: Strewn Smallclothes
housing.description: Home is where the heap of unfolded undergarments is.

housing.name: Strewn Bottoms
housing.description: A heap of folded pants.

housing.name: Towels
housing.description: Neatly folded and extraordinarily fluffy towels.

housing.name: Sofa Cushions
housing.description: A collection of pillows.

housing.name: Suzaku Wall Hanging
housing.description: An elegant relief depicting one of the Four Lords, alive with dancing flame.

housing.name: Enclave Map
housing.description: An artistic ink rendering of the spectacularly reconstructed Doman Enclave.

housing.name: Imitation Shuttered Window
housing.description: Louvered shutters that add a touch of the rustic to your interior decor.

housing.name: Mounted Plate Rack
housing.description: A sturdy wooden display for plates.

housing.name: Bathroom Wall Tiles
housing.description: A square of tiling used to prevent walls from becoming waterlogged.

housing.name: Bathroom Floor Tiles
housing.description: A large square of cerulean tiling with a built-in drain.
